id.description: The sys_id of the case or incident record

href.description: Relative link to the case or incident record

creationDate.description: The date that the case or incident record was created

lastUpdate.description: The date the record was last updated

name.description: The name of the trouble ticket, typically a short description of the issue

description.description: The description of the issue from the ticket

severity.description: The severity of the issue described by the trouble ticket

status.description: The current status of the trouble ticket

name.description: The name of the contact method

note.description: A list of all comments on the ticket (excludes work notes)

@type.description: The type of note (always 'comments' in responses)

date.description: The date the comment was created

author.description: The name of the user who wrote the comment

relatedEntity.description: List of impacted assets, products, sold products, configuration items, or services

id.description: Sys_id of the impacted item or service

name.description: Name of the impacted item or service

role.description: Description of the impacted item or service

relatedParty.description: Details about contacts for the ticket

@referredType.description:
Type of related party:
- assigned_to: User assigned to work on the ticket
- assignment_group: Group assigned to work on the ticket
- customer: Company or account for the ticket
- customer_contact: Caller or contact for the ticket
